title: Settings
settingsSubtitle: Tune Aithru Agent's models, tools, skills, memory, and runtime behavior from one managed surface.
modelsDescription: Configure providers and the models available to chat runs.
externalToolsDescription: Manage controlled MCP and HTTP tool configuration, secrets, and enablement state.
skillsDescription: Choose which agent skills are available for guided runs and managed work.
memoryDescription: Review the long-term memory provider and manage Mem0 forget controls.
runtimeDescription: Review live backend health and the startup settings that require a service restart.
runtimeDefaultsDescription: Startup environment values are read-only here. Change them in the process environment and restart the service.
chooseProviderTemplate: Choose a template on the left to configure a provider and its models.
modelStep: Configure the models exposed by this provider.
modelsHelp: Add the models this provider should expose to chat runs.
noModels: No models configured for this provider
